classes.reasoning: This document is titled 'eCRF -- CYCLE 1 DAY 8 VISIT' and contains structured per-patient, per-visit data capture fields including vital signs, laboratory results, adverse events, and drug compliance for patient BRC471-ES01-011, with investigator signature and verification fields typical of a Case Report Form.

summary: This is an electronic Case Report Form (eCRF) documenting the Cycle 1 Day 8 visit for patient BRC471-ES01-011 at site ES-01 in study BIORCE-ONC-2023-001. The form captures vital signs, laboratory results (haematology and chemistry), two ongoing adverse events (Grade 2 diarrhoea and Grade 1 dry mouth), and drug compliance data (98.2% compliance with one missed dose).
content:
eCRF -- CYCLE 1 DAY 8 VISIT
Study: BIORCE-ONC-2023-001 | Form v2.1 | Site: ES-01 | Patient: BRC471-ES01-011
Visit date: 13 January 2024 | Entered: R.Dominguez | Verified: Dr. A. Beltran

VITAL SIGNS
  BP: 132/84 mmHg | HR: 76 bpm | Temp: 37.0 degrees C | SpO2: 98% | Weight: 82.1 kg

LABORATORY RESULTS (C1D8)

  Haematology:
    Hb: 13.8 g/dL [N] | ANC: 4.1 x10^9/L [N] | Platelets: 228 x10^9/L [N]

  Chemistry:
    ALT: 38 U/L [N -- slightly elevated from baseline 22 U/L, still <ULN]
    AST: 29 U/L [N] | Creatinine: 74 umol/L [N] | K: 4.2 mmol/L [N]

  Note on ALT: increase 22 to 38 U/L, both below ULN (45 U/L at this site).
  No action required. Will monitor at C2D1.

ADVERSE EVENTS
  AE#1: Diarrhoea, Grade 2 -- onset Day 4 -- ongoing
    Action: Loperamide 2mg QID prescribed. Patient counselled.
    Relationship: Probably related. SAE: No.
  AE#2: Dry mouth, Grade 1 -- onset Day 5 -- ongoing
    Relationship: Possibly related. No action.

DRUG COMPLIANCE (patient self-report)
  Missed doses since C1D1: 1 (Day 6 morning)
  Compliance: 55/56 tablets = 98.2%

Investigator: Dr. A. Beltran   Sig: [SIGNED]   Date: 13/01/2024
